expectations.text: Includes firmographics, goals, pains, objections, buying triggers, watering holes, and decision role
expectations.evidence: The ICP includes firmographics (business type, industry, revenue, team size), goals, pains and frustrations, objections, buying triggers, and watering holes; decision role is implicit in the solo-owner persona description.

expectations.text: Explicitly flags the ICP as a hypothesis pending real customer evidence
expectations.evidence: The closing note reads 'This ICP is hypothesis-based. The strongest version would be validated against your actual customer data.'
The response proceeds directly to building the ICP without asking questions, which is acceptable given the 'may' qualifier in the assertion.
